positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of celestial bodies, featuring stylized crescent moons, constellations, and planetary rings rendered in deep indigo and gold foil accents. Clean lines, flat design, vector art style, perfect for screen printing, symmetrical composition, highly aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, gradient mesh
